title: American Legion Auxiliary
subtitle: Service, not self
hero: Supporting veterans, military, and their families alongside The American Legion.
body:
The American Legion Auxiliary is one of the world's largest patriotic service organizations, dedicated to supporting veterans, military, and their families. Auxiliary Unit 118 works hand-in-hand with Post 118 to serve Hendricks County.

Our members volunteer at hospitals, VA facilities, and community events. We fund scholarships and youth programs, support veterans and their families through hands-on service, and partner with The American Legion on community initiatives that make a real difference.

If you have a family connection to a veteran, we'd love to have you join our mission of service.

eligibility.title: Who Can Join
items: Spouse, parent, grandparent, sibling, or child of a veteran
Related to someone who served honorably during an eligible war era
Relation of a current American Legion member or eligible veteran

activities.title: What We Do
items: Support veterans and their families through hands-on service
Volunteer at hospitals, VA facilities, and community events
Partner with The American Legion on community initiatives

cta.text: To join, stop by Post 118 or call (317) 745-4736
